tasks.title: Design and implement a RESTful API using FastAPI.
tasks.work_description: Create a secure and scalable API that supports JWT authentication and rate limiting.

tasks.title: Develop an AI classification module (scikit-learn) with≥85% accuracy.
tasks.work_description: Train and deploy an AI model using scikit-learn that achieves at least 85% accuracy in classifying customer queries.

tasks.title: Fine-tune a BERT model for intent recognition (90% accuracy target).
tasks.work_description: Optimize the pre-trained BERT model to achieve at least 90% accuracy in identifying customer intents.

tasks.title: Develop a response suggestion system using cosine similarity on embeddings.
tasks.work_description: Create a system that suggests appropriate responses based on the similarity between customer queries and historical data.

tasks.title: Create a sentiment analysis module for automated escalation of frustrated users.
tasks.work_description: Implement a sentiment analysis feature that detects frustration in customer queries and escalates them accordingly.

tasks.title: Implement a PostgreSQL database schema with full-text search and proper indexing.
tasks.work_description: Design and create a robust database schema that includes full-text search capabilities and efficient indexing.

tasks.title: Create a ticket assignment algorithm based on agent skills, workload, and priority.
tasks.work_description: Design and implement an algorithm that assigns tickets to agents efficiently based on their skills, current workload, and urgency.

tasks.title: Build a real-time notification system using WebSockets.
tasks.work_description: Integrate a WebSocket-based notification system to alert agents and customers in real-time about updates and responses.

tasks.title: Develop an agent dashboard using React and TypeScript for real-time ticket management.
tasks.work_description: Create a user-friendly dashboard for agents to manage tickets in real-time, including features like filtering, sorting, and status updates.

tasks.title: Create a customer ticket submission form with file upload (up to 10MB).
tasks.work_description: Design and develop a form for customers to submit tickets, allowing attachments up to 10MB in size.
